headline: Texas PFAS Probe Tests Lululemon Brand Strength And Investor Confidence
summary: Texas has opened a formal investigation into lululemon athletica over potential use of PFAS chemicals in its apparel and related safety claims. The probe focuses on whether consumers were misled about product safety and the potential presence of so called forever chemicals. Lululemon has publicly denied ongoing PFAS use in its products and stated it is cooperating fully with investigators. The investigation comes at a time when NasdaqGS:LULU is trading at $160.6, with the share price down...

headline: A Look At Lululemon (LULU) Valuation As Texas PFAS Probe And Governance Strains Pressure Sentiment
summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton’s civil probe into potential PFAS, or forever chemicals, in lululemon athletica (LULU) apparel puts product safety disclosures, consumer trust, and regulatory risk firmly in focus for current and prospective shareholders. See our latest analysis for lululemon athletica. Despite a 1-day share price return of 1.33% and a 7-day share price return of 2.44%, lululemon’s year-to-date share price return of a 22.80% decline and 1-year total shareholder return of a...
